name: Beef Stuffed Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the barbecue sauce by combining all ingredients in a medium saucepan and simmering for 30 minutes.
2. Butterfly the pork loin roast by splitting it lengthwise almost to the opposite side, then spreading it flat. Pound out to a 15 x 10-inch rectangle that is about 3/4 inch thick.
3. Brush one side of the pork with 1/4 cup of barbecue sauce.
4. Combine ground beef, onion, garlic, salt, pepper, and an additional 1/4 cup of barbecue sauce in a bowl. Spread evenly over the roast.
5. Press mushrooms into the meat mixture.
6. Sprinkle bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese over the meat.
7. Starting from one short side, roll up the roast tightly and tie securely with kitchen twine.
8. Place the pork on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
9. Roast uncovered at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 2 1/2 hours.
10. Baste with additional barbecue sauce during the last 15 to 20 minutes of cooking.
11. Serve with celery leaves, if desired. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
